title: Question: delay in non-blocking assignment
body:
---


Author Name: **Alex Solomatnikov**
Original Redmine Message: 405 from https://www.veripool.org



---

This is not a critical issue and I don't think the code makes sense except for making waveforms easier to understand, but verilator errors out on the following code (VCS does not):


`define CLK2Q     #1

    always @(posedge Clk)
    begin: Reset_Write

       integer unsigned i;

       //----- Reset
       if (Reset)
       begin
*         ReqValid <= `CLK2Q 'b0;
*
Verilator output:

%Error: mshr.v:371: syntax error, unexpected ';'
